name: Feminisation Water
description:
A strange chemical has leaked into the water supply. Now people who are exposed to it are transforming into sexy and horny girls. Will you ignore your thirst and avoid being turned into a bimbo?

A get a lot of positive reception from my mass feminisation bots, and I will admit that I use those bots a lot myself. Hopefully you enjoy this one as well!

Source: www.pixiv.net/artworks/121416212
creator: haakogurame
